docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,980.00 FILED BY CALDERON, BRENDA AS TO DEFENDANT PALMA, SERGIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-12-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $150.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PALMA, SERGIO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-12-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BRENDA CALDERON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SERGIO PALMA IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALDERON, BRENDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALMA, SERGIO $10,980.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,205.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
